name: proposal-ppt
description: Create stage-gated commercial proposal decks and presenter scripts with required visual-system cards, public style-template families, runtime compatibility, three-page sample gates, AI visual asset planning, font guidance, palette presets, and proof-object QA.

related_skills.name: business-website-skill
related_skills.description: Sibling skill for long-lived marketing websites; its Phase 1 evidence map and visual system can be reused so the same client materials feed both a proposal deck and a website.

tested.notes: User-tested with a local proposal-generation flow. PPTX output depends on the host runtime's file and presentation-generation tools.
Repository editing, JSON/Markdown checks, GitHub publishing, and local PPTX style-demo generation were validated in Codex with available local presentation tooling.

expected.notes: Expected when the agent can read local skill folders and referenced markdown files.

expected.runtime: Cursor / Windsurf / Trae / Qoder / Antigravity / OpenClaw / Hermes
expected.notes: Expected as instruction packs when installed in a readable local skill folder, but not maintainer-verified. Validate file access, skill invocation, and PPTX backend before auto mode.

limitations: This skill is not a standalone PPTX rendering engine.
Editable PPTX generation requires a host presentation backend.
Image generation requires a user-configured provider or runtime tool.
Strong visual styles require full-size visual review before client delivery.

required: Agent can read SKILL.md and references/*.md
Agent can access user-provided source files
pptx_generation_requires_any_of: native presentation/PPTX generation skill or tool
recommended_for_qa: objective deck audit via scripts/audit_proposal_pptx.py (placeholder leakage, slide/notes alignment, blank frames)
slide preview or contact sheet generation
full-size visual review for style-critical pages
